title: The Giants Rush Toward Crisis
description: On pages 6–8, this part follows Unknown person #7, Jarul, Robin, Unknown person #8, Franky, Gerd as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: It's not your fault, chief jarull!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The words of our ancestors are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it so hard to show a little joy?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I'm super sorry for being alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's all my fault that everything is burning!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You lot have no right to take that away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You do know resisting means the Hostages will die, right?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
